statement: Every implementation enrolled after the lifecycle protocol was instituted (post_protocol: true) records a pre-review BEFORE the work: seat model ids for the run, newly-available models considered, the task loadout + prior retrospectives read, and which optimizations were adopted. Intent recorded up front; actuality proven by per-seat provenance downstream.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (post_protocol enrollment without a pre_review record fails)

statement: Each implementation creates a sub-system recorded in the enrollment registry with its evidence and memory dirs — maintained under The Iliad umbrella, never left as untracked artifacts.
No enrollment is 'delivered' without its retrospective, and a retrospective must carry at least one feed-forward optimization naming where it lands — the loop is closed, not ceremonial.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (delivered => retrospective exists, parses, optimizations_for_future_runs non-empty with lands_in)

statement: ai-forge, forge, and saas-forge remain deferred for CONSCIOUS enrollment (AM-40): the registry's deferred list is exactly the package-roots exclusions, and enrolling one requires a deliberate amendment, never absorption by proximity.
